issue_summary: Test and fix local string parsing
javadoc_before:
/** * Returns a generic ISO time parser for parsing local times. * It accepts formats described by the following syntax: * 
     * time           = ['T'] time-element
     * time-element   = HH [minute-element] | [fraction]
     * minute-element = ':' mm [second-element] | [fraction]
     * second-element = ':' ss [fraction]
     * fraction       = ('.' | ',') digit+
     *
* @since 1.3 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Returns a generic ISO time parser for parsing local times. * This parser is initialised with the local (UTC) time zone. *

* It accepts formats described by the following syntax: * 

     * time           = ['T'] time-element
     * time-element   = HH [minute-element] | [fraction]
     * minute-element = ':' mm [second-element] | [fraction]
     * second-element = ':' ss [fraction]
     * fraction       = ('.' | ',') digit+
     *
* @since 1.3 */
